name: Entrapment
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Entrapment (Rich Gowell, 1999): each turn move your roamers and wall the board with barriers laid in the grooves between squares. Jumping your own flat barrier tips it upright — permanently impassable to everyone. Fully surround an enemy roamer so it cannot escape to capture it; capture all enemy roamers to win. Rules per Boardspace.net (also the venue where the designer's own archived games live).
